generatedPrompt:
Vytvor nebo uprav cast systemu podle nasledujiciho zadani.

KONTEXT:
- Zdrojova polozka: Improve Sources
- Zdrojova sekce: Sources
- Rezim prace: create a new feature
- Priorita: P2

AKTUALNI STAV:
- Sources is reachable as a dashboard section and can now trigger a global improvement run.
- System context has 53 dashboard page routes, 21 registered agent folders and 66 plan missions.
- Latest plan update detected at 2026-05-20T02:55:45.624Z.
- Captured UI snapshot: Sources Manager | Sources ManagerRSS feeds · artist tracking · priority pipeline Artist Database RefreshRSS Sources271174 activeArtists976915 trackedQueue Pending0awaiting scoutConverted0→ publishedRSS Sources271 total · 174 active Add Sour...

PROBLEMY K VYRESENI:
- Sources does not yet expose explicit success metrics, owner map and next-action checkpoints in one compact control surface.
- Ideas can be created faster than they can be converted into validated implementation prompts.
- Improvement decisions need a stable link between the source section, selected brainstorming points and final prompt artifact.
- Audit context exists (7 recent files sampled), but section-level actions need clearer traceability back to CEO / Brainstorming.

VYBRANE BODY Z BRAINSTORMINGU:
Cile:
- Mission alignment: Keep the change tied to CEO goals, current plan and measurable system impact.
- Section objective: Define exactly what Sources should do better after the upgrade.

Funkce:
- Improvement trigger: Preserve the arrow-up trigger and make the generated proposal visible in the brainstorming backlog.
- Prompt linkage: Attach the generated prompt to the original brainstorming item with a visible P action.
- Status workflow: Support open, selected, in progress, done and archived states for improvement ideas.

Data:
- Structured artifact: Save title, source section, current state, problems, ideas, impact, tools, agents, steps, priority and status.
- Intel storage: Persist analysis selections in INTEL / brainstorming and final prompts in INTEL / brainstorming / prompts.

UI / UX:
- Popup tabs: Use a compact tabbed popup with checkbox groups for goals, features, data, UX, risks and implementation.
- Copy action: Expose a copy button next to the final prompt so it can be reused instantly.

Rizika:
- Scope control: Avoid broad redesign and keep the change inside existing architecture and UI patterns.

Implementace:
- API routes: Add server endpoints for listing proposals, creating analyses, saving selections and generating prompts.
- Verification: Run lint or build after implementation and document any blocker.

POZADOVANY VYSTUP:
- nejdriv analyzuj existujici architekturu
- pouzij stavajici UI styl, komponenty, datove struktury a uloziste
- implementuj funkcni reseni end-to-end
- udrz zmenu malou, citelnou a napojenou na zdrojovou sekci
- pridej nebo uprav testy podle rizika zmeny
- po implementaci over build, lint nebo relevantni testy
- v zaveru popis zmenene soubory, ulozena data, zpusob overeni a zbyvajici rizika

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- Create or update the source section without redesigning unrelated pages.
- Persist a structured improvement proposal in INTEL / brainstorming.
- Run Brainstorming Agent analysis and let the user select concrete points.
- Generate a final prompt connected to the original item.
- Expose prompt open and copy actions in the brainstorming listing.
